---
title: "R Notebook"

---

## testing out different bin sizes and what information is contained by them 
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(Matrix)

setDTthreads(max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1))
```


```{r}
parse_numbat_bins <- function(allele_bin_df) {
  bins <- rownames(allele_bin_df)

  x <- data.table(bin_id = bins)
  x[, CHROM := sub(":.*", "", bin_id)]
  x[, START := as.integer(sub(".*:(.*)-.*", "\\1", bin_id))]
  x[, END := as.integer(sub(".*-", "", bin_id))]
  x[, CHROM := sub("^chr", "", CHROM)]

  x[]
}
```




```{r}
prepare_native_baf_counts <- function(allele_bin_df, snp_df) {
  native <- make_phased_snp_bin_counts(
    snp_df = snp_df,
    allele_bin_df = allele_bin_df
  )

  native <- as.data.table(native)

  bins <- parse_numbat_bins(allele_bin_df)
  bins <- as.data.table(bins)
  setorder(bins, CHROM, START)

  bins[, bin_index := seq_len(.N), by = CHROM]

  native <- merge(
    native,
    bins[, .(bin_id, CHROM, START, END, bin_index)],
    by = "bin_id",
    all.x = TRUE
  )

  native[, hap1_count := as.numeric(hap1_count)]
  native[, hap2_count := as.numeric(hap2_count)]
  native[, n_snps := as.integer(n_snps)]
  native[, native_total := hap1_count + hap2_count]

  native <- native[native_total > 0 & !is.na(bin_index)]

  setkey(native, CHROM, bin_index, cell)

  native[]
}
```


```{r}
native_baf <- prepare_native_baf_counts(
  allele_bin_df = allele_bin_df,
  snp_df = snp_df
)
```



```{r}
evaluate_allele_dropout_by_binsize_fast <- function(
  native_baf,
  bins_per_superbin_grid = c(1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100),
  min_depth = 10,
  min_snps = 3,
  dropout_minor_frac = 0.05,
  min_usable_superbins_per_spot = 20
) {
  all_summary <- vector("list", length(bins_per_superbin_grid))
  all_spot_summary <- vector("list", length(bins_per_superbin_grid))

  for (ii in seq_along(bins_per_superbin_grid)) {
    b <- bins_per_superbin_grid[ii]
    message("Evaluating bins_per_superbin = ", b)

    x <- copy(native_baf)

    x[, superbin_index := ceiling(bin_index / b)]

    if (b == 1) {
      super <- x[, .(
        hap1_count = as.numeric(hap1_count),
        hap2_count = as.numeric(hap2_count),
        snp_depth = as.numeric(hap1_count + hap2_count),
        n_snps = as.integer(n_snps),
        n_native_bins = as.integer(1)
      ), by = .(cell, CHROM, superbin_index)]
    } else {
      super <- x[, .(
        hap1_count = as.numeric(sum(hap1_count, na.rm = TRUE)),
        hap2_count = as.numeric(sum(hap2_count, na.rm = TRUE)),
        snp_depth = as.numeric(sum(hap1_count + hap2_count, na.rm = TRUE)),
        n_snps = as.integer(sum(n_snps, na.rm = TRUE)),
        n_native_bins = as.integer(uniqueN(bin_id))
      ), by = .(cell, CHROM, superbin_index)]
    }

    super[, total := as.numeric(hap1_count + hap2_count)]
    super <- super[total > 0]

    super[, minor_count := pmin(hap1_count, hap2_count)]
    super[, minor_frac := minor_count / total]
    super[, baf := hap2_count / total]

    usable_x <- super[
      total >= min_depth &
        n_snps >= min_snps
    ]

    if (nrow(usable_x) == 0) {
      all_summary[[ii]] <- data.table(
        bins_per_superbin = b,
        n_spots_total = uniqueN(super$cell),
        n_spots_passing = 0L,
        n_usable_observations = 0L,
        median_usable_superbins_per_spot = NA_real_,
        median_total_snp_depth_per_spot = NA_real_,
        median_superbin_depth = NA_real_,
        median_snps_per_superbin = NA_real_,
        observed_dropout_rate = NA_real_,
        expected_dropout_rate = NA_real_,
        excess_dropout_rate = NA_real_,
        median_minor_frac = NA_real_,
        mean_abs_baf_dev = NA_real_
      )
      next
    }

    usable_x[, observed_dropout := minor_frac <= dropout_minor_frac]

    usable_x[, dropout_k := floor(dropout_minor_frac * total)]
    usable_x[, expected_dropout_prob := 2 * pbinom(dropout_k, size = total, prob = 0.5)]
    usable_x[, expected_dropout_prob := pmin(expected_dropout_prob, 1)]

    spot_summary <- usable_x[, .(
      n_usable_superbins = as.integer(.N),
      total_snp_depth = as.numeric(sum(total, na.rm = TRUE)),
      median_superbin_depth = as.numeric(median(total, na.rm = TRUE)),
      median_n_snps = as.numeric(median(n_snps, na.rm = TRUE)),
      observed_dropout_rate = as.numeric(mean(observed_dropout, na.rm = TRUE)),
      expected_dropout_rate = as.numeric(mean(expected_dropout_prob, na.rm = TRUE)),
      excess_dropout_rate = as.numeric(
        mean(observed_dropout, na.rm = TRUE) -
          mean(expected_dropout_prob, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      median_minor_frac = as.numeric(median(minor_frac, na.rm = TRUE)),
      mean_abs_baf_dev = as.numeric(weighted.mean(abs(baf - 0.5), total, na.rm = TRUE))
    ), by = cell]

    spot_summary[, bins_per_superbin := as.integer(b)]

    keep_spots <- spot_summary[
      n_usable_superbins >= min_usable_superbins_per_spot
    ]

    global_summary <- data.table(
      bins_per_superbin = as.integer(b),
      n_spots_total = as.integer(uniqueN(super$cell)),
      n_spots_passing = as.integer(nrow(keep_spots)),
      n_usable_observations = as.integer(nrow(usable_x)),
      median_usable_superbins_per_spot = as.numeric(median(spot_summary$n_usable_superbins, na.rm = TRUE)),
      median_total_snp_depth_per_spot = as.numeric(median(spot_summary$total_snp_depth, na.rm = TRUE)),
      median_superbin_depth = as.numeric(median(usable_x$total, na.rm = TRUE)),
      median_snps_per_superbin = as.numeric(median(usable_x$n_snps, na.rm = TRUE)),
      observed_dropout_rate = as.numeric(mean(usable_x$observed_dropout, na.rm = TRUE)),
      expected_dropout_rate = as.numeric(mean(usable_x$expected_dropout_prob, na.rm = TRUE)),
      excess_dropout_rate = as.numeric(
        mean(usable_x$observed_dropout, na.rm = TRUE) -
          mean(usable_x$expected_dropout_prob, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      median_minor_frac = as.numeric(median(usable_x$minor_frac, na.rm = TRUE)),
      mean_abs_baf_dev = as.numeric(weighted.mean(abs(usable_x$baf - 0.5), usable_x$total, na.rm = TRUE))
    )

    all_summary[[ii]] <- global_summary
    all_spot_summary[[ii]] <- spot_summary
  }

  list(
    global = rbindlist(all_summary, fill = TRUE),
    per_spot = rbindlist(all_spot_summary, fill = TRUE)
  )
}

dropout_res <- evaluate_allele_dropout_by_binsize_fast(
  native_baf = native_baf,
  bins_per_superbin_grid = c(1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100),
  min_depth = 10,
  min_snps = 3,
  dropout_minor_frac = 0.05,
  min_usable_superbins_per_spot = 20
)

dropout_res$global

saveRDS(dropout_res, '/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/analysis/src/cnv_calling/numbat/numbat/dropout_res.rds')
```

```{r}
plot_dropout_binsize_diagnostics <- function(dropout_res) {
  g <- dropout_res$global

  p1 <- ggplot(g, aes(bins_per_superbin, excess_dropout_rate)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = "Excess allele dropout versus bin size",
      x = "Native Numbat bins pooled per superbin",
      y = "Observed dropout - expected binomial dropout"
    )

  p2 <- ggplot(g, aes(bins_per_superbin, n_spots_passing)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = "Spots retained versus bin size",
      x = "Native Numbat bins pooled per superbin",
      y = "Number of spots passing coverage"
    )

  p3 <- ggplot(g, aes(bins_per_superbin, median_usable_superbins_per_spot)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = "Usable genomic bins per spot",
      x = "Native Numbat bins pooled per superbin",
      y = "Median usable superbins per spot"
    )

  p4 <- ggplot(g, aes(bins_per_superbin, median_superbin_depth)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = "SNP depth per superbin",
      x = "Native Numbat bins pooled per superbin",
      y = "Median SNP depth"
    )

  print(p1)
  print(p2)
  print(p3)
  print(p4)
}
```

```{r}
pdf("allele_dropout_binsize_diagnostics.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
plot_dropout_binsize_diagnostics(dropout_res)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
p1+p2+p3+p4
```


```{r}
choose_optimal_binsize <- function(
  dropout_res,
  max_excess_dropout = 0.05,
  min_spots_passing_frac = 0.70,
  min_usable_superbins_per_spot = 30,
  min_median_superbin_depth = 20
) {
  g <- copy(dropout_res$global)

  max_spots <- max(g$n_spots_total, na.rm = TRUE)

  candidates <- g[
    excess_dropout_rate <= max_excess_dropout &
      n_spots_passing >= min_spots_passing_frac * max_spots &
      median_usable_superbins_per_spot >= min_usable_superbins_per_spot &
      median_superbin_depth >= min_median_superbin_depth
  ]

  if (nrow(candidates) == 0) {
    warning("No bin size passed all thresholds. Returning closest compromise.")
    g[, rank_score :=
        rank(excess_dropout_rate, ties.method = "average") -
        rank(n_spots_passing, ties.method = "average") -
        rank(median_usable_superbins_per_spot, ties.method = "average")]
    return(g[order(rank_score)][1])
  }

  candidates[order(bins_per_superbin)][1]
}

optimal <- choose_optimal_binsize(
  dropout_res,
  max_excess_dropout = 0.05,
  min_spots_passing_frac = 0.70,
  min_usable_superbins_per_spot = 30,
  min_median_superbin_depth = 20
)

optimal
```


## checking the size of the bins

```{r}
compute_superbin_sizes <- function(allele_bin_df, bins_per_superbin = 20) {
  library(data.table)

  bins <- parse_numbat_bins(allele_bin_df)
  bins <- as.data.table(bins)

  setorder(bins, CHROM, START)

  bins[, native_bin_size := END - START]
  bins[, superbin_index := ceiling(seq_len(.N) / bins_per_superbin), by = CHROM]
  bins[, superbin_id := paste0(CHROM, "_superbin_", superbin_index)]

  superbins <- bins[, .(
    CHROM = CHROM[1],
    START = min(START),
    END = max(END),
    n_native_bins = .N,
    superbin_size_bp = max(END) - min(START),
    median_native_bin_size_bp = median(native_bin_size)
  ), by = superbin_id]

  list(
    summary = data.frame(
      bins_per_superbin = bins_per_superbin,
      n_superbins = nrow(superbins),
      median_superbin_size_bp = median(superbins$superbin_size_bp),
      mean_superbin_size_bp = mean(superbins$superbin_size_bp),
      min_superbin_size_bp = min(superbins$superbin_size_bp),
      max_superbin_size_bp = max(superbins$superbin_size_bp),
      median_superbin_size_mb = median(superbins$superbin_size_bp) / 1e6
    ),
    superbins = superbins
  )
}

compute_superbin_size_grid <- function(
  allele_bin_df,
  bins_per_superbin_grid = c(1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200)
) {
  library(data.table)

  out <- lapply(bins_per_superbin_grid, function(b) {
    compute_superbin_sizes(
      allele_bin_df = allele_bin_df,
      bins_per_superbin = b
    )$summary
  })

  rbindlist(out)
}



superbin_size_summary <- compute_superbin_size_grid(
  allele_bin_df = allele_bin_df,
  bins_per_superbin_grid = c(1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200)
)

superbin_size_summary
```

## making rds for 2.2Mb bins 

```{r}
library(GenomicRanges)
library(IRanges)

make_var2200kb_from_var220 <- function(
  var220,
  bins_per_group = 10,
  out_rds = "var2200kb.rds",
  out_hist = "var2200kb_bin_size_hist.pdf"
) {
  stopifnot(inherits(var220, "GRanges"))

  var220 <- sortSeqlevels(var220)
  var220 <- sort(var220)

  gr_list <- split(var220, seqnames(var220))

  pooled <- lapply(gr_list, function(gr) {
    n <- length(gr)
    group_id <- ceiling(seq_len(n) / bins_per_group)

    out <- GRanges(
      seqnames = as.character(seqnames(gr))[1],
      ranges = IRanges(
        start = tapply(start(gr), group_id, min),
        end = tapply(end(gr), group_id, max)
      ),
      strand = "*"
    )

    out$n_native_bins <- as.integer(tapply(start(gr), group_id, length))
    out
  })

  var2200kb <- unlist(GRangesList(pooled), use.names = FALSE)
  var2200kb <- sort(var2200kb)

  saveRDS(var2200kb, out_rds)

  pdf(out_hist, width = 7, height = 5)
  hist(
    width(var2200kb) / 1e6,
    breaks = 60,
    col = "gray70",
    border = "white",
    main = "var2200kb bin size sanity check",
    xlab = "Bin size, Mb"
  )
  abline(v = median(width(var2200kb) / 1e6), col = "red", lwd = 2)
  legend(
    "topright",
    legend = paste0("Median = ", round(median(width(var2200kb) / 1e6), 3), " Mb"),
    bty = "n"
  )
  dev.off()

  message("Saved: ", out_rds)
  message("Saved: ", out_hist)
  message("Original ranges: ", length(var220))
  message("Pooled ranges: ", length(var2200kb))
  message("Median pooled bin size Mb: ", round(median(width(var2200kb) / 1e6), 4))

  var2200kb
}
```

```{r}
var2200kb <- make_var2200kb_from_var220(
  var220 = var220,
  bins_per_group = 10,
  out_rds = "var2200kb.rds",
  out_hist = "var2200kb_bin_size_hist.pdf"
)
```


```{r}
var2200kb
summary(width(var2200kb) / 1e6)
table(mcols(var2200kb)$n_native_bins)
```
